about: A LABELED routing eval set, richer than the curated route-tests.json fixtures: for each real route of the routage-pme corpus (2 agents, 5 processes) it carries MANY phrasings — clear hits, paraphrases, avoid_when near-misses, out-of-scope queries (must abstain), ambiguous queries (must ask) and multilingual EN→FR queries (the one place embeddings beat lexical). Each query is labeled with its EXPECTED outcome, strategy-independent: the runner scores how well a strategy matches the labels. `outcome` is one of: `route` (must route to agent+process — a true positive when matched), `abstain_ambiguous` (must NOT confidently route; must ask/clarify — status ambiguous|needs_clarification), `abstain_out_of_scope` (must abstain entirely — out_of_scope, or needs_clarification with no route). `agent`/`process` are required for `route`; `agent` is optional on an abstention (a hint, not scored hard).
